title: Bug Zapper, 2-in-1 4200V 15W Electric Insect Killer with UV LED Light, IPX4 Waterproof Pest Fly Zapper with 1.2m Power Cord, Mosquito Killer Trap for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Home & Garden, Black
bullet_points: 🔋 Powerful & Dual-Function Design – This electric fly zappper Combines 15W UV mosquito luring tech with a 4200V electric grid to instantly kill flies, mosquitoes, and pests. The built-in 9W LED light offers gentle night lighting—practical and energy-saving.

💧 IPX4 Waterproof & Versatile Use – Mosquito killer Designed for indoor and outdoor areas like bathrooms, balconies, patios, gardens, and courtyards. Comes with a 1.2m power cord for flexible placement. Ideal hanging height: 4–8 feet.

📡 Wide Coverage & Quiet Operation – The fly killer Emits 360° UV rays to cover up to 150m². Long-lasting UV lamp (up to 9,000 hours) ensures extended use. the insect killer Operates silently, improving sleep quality without disruption.
🧼 Easy Setup & Maintenance – Just plug the fly zapper in and power on—no setup required. Bottom tray detaches for quick cleaning. UV bulb is simple to replace, keeping performance at its best.
🌿 Safe, Eco-Friendly & Durable – Made of flame-retardant, high-temp-resistant ABS. Non-toxic, chemical-free, and safe for families. Insulated grid prevents accidental contact for peace of mind.
